subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Dreyfus home in Paris, 1913-05-30
subcodes.first_line: This is a blessed night because Consul Schwarz and his respected wife have come from Germany with the greatest of longing so that they may associate with you.
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity in diversity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
